args.command:
cat > /tmp/find_used_middleware.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Find which middleware functions are actually used in app.ts

app_ts="/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/app.ts"

# List of key security middleware to check
middleware_functions=(
  "requestId"
  "securityHeaders"
  "securityLogging"
  "httpMethodRestrictions"
  "httpRequestSmuggling"
  "httpResponseSplitting"
  "requestSizeLimits"
  "inputSanitization"
  "jsonDepthProtection"
  "optionalAuth"
  "csrfProtection"
  "hppProtection"
  "rateLimiter"
  "responseSizeLimits"
  "cors"
  "validateBody"
  "validateQuery"
  "validateParams"
  "requireResourceAccess"
  "requireAdmin"
  "requirePermission"
  "requireRole"
  "requireOwnershipOrAdmin"
  "auditLogAccess"
  "requireSameOrigin"
  "hostHeaderProtection"
  "pathTraversalPrevention"
  "ssrfProtection"
  "authRateLimit"
  "securityCheckOnStartup"
  "massAssignmentProtection"
  "openRedirectProtection"
  "sessionSecurity"
  "cookieSecurityValidator"
  "verifyCaptcha"
  "notifySecurityEvent"
)

echo "=== Middleware Usage in app.ts ==="
echo ""

for func in "${middleware_functions[@]}"; do
  if grep -q "$func" "$app_ts"; then
    echo "✓ $func - USED"
  else
    echo "✗ $func - NOT USED"
  fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/find_used_middleware.sh
/tmp/find_used_middleware.sh
